nasb.text: Now when several days had elapsed, King Agrippa and Bernice arrived at Caesarea and paid their respects to Festus.

esv.text: Now when some days had passed, Agrippa the king and Bernice arrived at Caesarea and greeted Festus.

cnv.text: 過了一些日子，亞基帕王和百尼基到該撒利亞來，問候非斯都。

ccb.text: 过了几天，亚基帕王和百妮姬一起到凯撒利亚问候非斯都。

csbs.text: 过了几天，阿格里帕王和百妮基到达凯撒里亚，问候菲斯特斯。
